transcript.content: Your monthly price of $50 is double what we pay now. Match $25 or we walk.
Our BATNA is $75,000 with another vendor but we prefer your platform.
$25 is absurd. You have no other option — no other vendor supports your legacy systems.
That is not true. We have SOC2 certification from three other vendors. You are misleading us.
Those vendors will fail your audit. You must accept our terms. $45 final.
We refuse to negotiate under false pretenses. Walking away.
